'''Cariaga Sin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who lived in the time of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
Cariaga was present during a gathering called by [[Darth Malak|Malak]], around the time [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] decided to involve the Order in the Mandalorian Wars (circa [[3963 BBY]]), along with [[Meetra Surik]] and [[Bastila Shan]], and fellow Jedi [[Talvon Esan]], [[Nisotsa]], and [[Xaset Terep]]. Cariaga herself ultimately elected to defy the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], and to go to war with Malak and Revan against the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]].

In the Exile's vision, she wielded a blue [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Behind the scenes==
Cariaga Sin's face is one of the available female faces for the Jedi Exile, to be chosen by the player at the start of the game. If the player, as a female, chooses her face, then Sin's face would be replaced with another.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} {{Vision|[[Meetra Surik]]}}
